title: panelforge-figures: a modality-first publication-grade figure system for systems biology and computational biophysics
description:
Modality-first, publication-grade figure system for systems biology and computational biophysics, with an embedded Claude Code skill for agentic bootstrap inside any manuscript repository.

Ships 471 statistically contract-bound recipes across 20 modalities, an agent-discoverable recipe index, provenance and reproducibility tooling (content-addressed figure hashes, environment lockfiles), pre-submission auditors (venue-fit, visualization-bias, figure-claim consistency, cross-reference linting), STAR Methods and reporting-checklist generators (ARRIVE / CONSORT / STARD / MIQE), and a privacy-by-construction data-class safety layer that gates all LLM, vision, and telemetry channels.
